component.name: chatgpt-work-linux
component.summary: Lightweight community Linux shell for the ChatGPT Work web experience

description.p: chatgpt-work-linux provides an isolated, lightweight GTK/WebKit desktop window for the official ChatGPT web service, plus native Linux global shortcuts, screenshot capture, downloads, permissions, diagnostics, and Chromium/browser compatibility fallbacks.
This is an independent community project. It is not produced, supported, or endorsed by OpenAI and does not include OpenAI application binaries or artwork.
Initial native Linux architecture and packaging.
